source_jobs.description: <div class="content-intro"><p style="text-align: justify;"><span style="color: rgb(22, 145, 121);"><strong>Netradyne</strong></span> harnesses the power of Computer Vision and Edge Computing to revolutionize the modern-day transportation ecosystem. We are a leader in fleet safety solutions. With growth exceeding 4x year over year, our solution is quickly being recognized as a significant disruptive technology. Our team is growing, and we need forward-thinking, uncompromising, competitive team members to continue to facilitate our growth.</p></div><p>Job Title: Principal Enterprise Architect – Business Systems Group (BSG)<br>Location: Bangalore, India (Onsite)<br>Department: Business Systems Group<br>Reporting To: Vice President, BSG<br>Role Summary:<br>The Principal Enterprise Architect – BSG will be the end-to-end owner of enterprise IT and business&nbsp;<br>systems architecture at Netradyne. In this strategic leadership role, you will define and drive the&nbsp;<br>architectural vision for Netradyne’s Business Systems Group (BSG), ensuring our technology&nbsp;<br>platforms are agile, secure, and scalable in line with BSG’s vision of enabling enterprise-wide&nbsp;<br>transformation, streamlined operations, and data-driven decision-making. You will partner closely with&nbsp;<br>business and technology leaders across domains – , Sales, Finance, Marketing, HR, Customer&nbsp;<br>Success, Product, Engineering, Business Operations, IT Infosec and other support functions – to&nbsp;<br>design and evangelize integrated solutions that enhance operational efficiency, reinforce governance&nbsp;<br>and compliance, and accelerate innovation for Netradyne’s continued growth.<br>Key Responsibilities:<br>• Enterprise Architecture Strategy: Develop and maintain the enterprise architecture roadmap<br>for BSG, aligning technology initiatives with Netradyne’s strategic business objectives.&nbsp;<br>Champion architectures that support enterprise-wide digital transformation and the&nbsp;<br>standardization of core business processes.<br>• Solution Design &amp; Integration: Own the “how” of solution architecture – lead end-to-end&nbsp;<br>design of scalable, secure, and integrated systems across CRM, ERP, analytics, and IT&nbsp;<br>platforms. Ensure seamless data flow and interoperability between applications (e.g.&nbsp;<br>Salesforce, NetSuite, Snowflake, Tableau, Gainsight, Workday) to streamline operations and&nbsp;<br>improve cross-functional efficiency.<br>• Technical Quality &amp; Governance: Establish and enforce architectural standards and best&nbsp;<br>practices for development and integration. Oversee technical design reviews to ensure high&nbsp;<br>system reliability, security, and performance, and that all solutions comply with enterprise&nbsp;<br>security and compliance requirements. Lead the architecture governance process, including&nbsp;<br>architecture review boards and documentation of reference architectures.<br>• Development Enablement: Guide and mentor BSG development and solution teams on&nbsp;<br>architecture principles and modern development frameworks. Provide development&nbsp;<br>enablement by creating reusable frameworks and design patterns, and by promoting agile and&nbsp;<br>DevOps practices to improve delivery speed and technical excellence.<br>• Innovation &amp; Automation: Drive technology innovation and automation initiatives within&nbsp;<br>BSG, in line with our mission to accelerate digital solutions. Evaluate emerging technologies (e.g.&nbsp;<br>cloud services, AI/ML, low-code platforms) and provide thought leadership on the
